payload.answer: I have an existing memory that Sara is your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. Please clarify which relationship is correct, or whether these refer to different people named Sara.

entity_resolution.reason: The input refers to Sara, which appears to be the same named person as the existing memory.

details: Detected a conflict between the existing relationship and the new input.
No durable memory was committed pending clarification.

repair_options: Keep the existing memory: Sara is my daughter.
Replace the existing memory with: Sara is my niece.
Record that there are two different people named Sara, one your daughter and one your niece.
Record a more specific explanation if both relationships are true in your family context.
